title: MobCommentary
description: Mobs occasionally broadcast sarcastic commentary about player actions to the server chat, as if they're watching and judging.
body:
# MobCommentary

Adds absurd humor by giving nearby mobs a voice. When players perform certain actions, there's a small chance a mob within range will broadcast a snarky comment to chat, attributed to that mob type and location.

**Tracked Events:** Block breaking, crafting items, taking damage, killing mobs, failing tasks

**Mob Personalities:**
- Zombies: slow-witted and mean
- Skeletons: coldly analytical
- Pigs: surprisingly philosophical
- Endermen: cryptic disappointment

**Features:**
- Configurable comment frequency and trigger events
- Lightweight with randomized cooldowns to prevent spam
- Each mob type has its own comment pool
